branch_vs_claim.title: Committed HEAD still lacks FeatureTransform
branch_vs_claim.detail: git show HEAD:backtest_app/historical_data/features.py still exposes FeatureScaler-only semantics. The claimed explicit transform contract is not present in committed HEAD.

branch_vs_claim.title: Committed HEAD still includes absolute macro level and raw dollar_volume in default similarity
branch_vs_claim.detail: HEAD context features still emit *_level values and liquidity still emits raw dollar_volume by default, so the committed branch is still on the old similarity contract.

branch_vs_claim.title: Committed HEAD still uses single-day macro payload for event similarity semantics
branch_vs_claim.detail: HEAD build_event_memory_asof calls build_query_embedding with macro_history={feature_end_date: macro_payload}, while query embeddings use trailing macro history up to decision date.

branch_vs_claim.title: Committed HEAD still has query/event transform semantic mismatch
branch_vs_claim.detail: HEAD has no authoritative transformed-feature contract shared by event, query, and prototype paths, and event/query macro windows are different.

working_tree_vs_head.title: Working tree introduces FeatureTransform and separates regime-only context
working_tree_vs_head.detail: Current working tree adds FeatureTransform, transformed feature storage, regime_context_features, and default similarity exclusions that do not exist in committed HEAD.

working_tree_vs_head.title: Working tree changes event/query/prototype to a shared transform contract
working_tree_vs_head.detail: Current working tree fits FeatureTransform on raw event rows, aliases scaler to transform.scaler, applies the same transform to queries, and persists transformed embeddings into prototype lineage.

working_tree_vs_head.title: Working tree medium driver has provenance and verdict gating not present in prior artifacts
working_tree_vs_head.detail: Current working tree records authoritative provenance, metadata-application checks, and excludes dirty or misapplied runs from verdicts; older outputs were produced without that contract.

run_provenance_gap.title: Prior medium outputs are not authoritative
run_provenance_gap.detail: Existing medium artifacts were produced while committed HEAD truth and dirty working-tree truth were mixed, so they cannot be used for TOBE viability verdicts.

run_provenance_gap.title: Prior diagnosis compared synthetic variants inside one code state
run_provenance_gap.detail: The previous diagnosis flow did not run clean baseline ref versus clean fixed state, so it did not establish a trustworthy baseline-vs-fixed comparison.

run_provenance_gap.title: Run artifacts did not consistently pin git provenance
run_provenance_gap.detail: Branch, head_commit, dirty_worktree, changed_tracked_files, diff_fingerprint, and authoritative status were not consistently persisted, leaving run provenance ambiguous.
